title: Environment Clarifications (pytorch, CUDA, H100)
body:
1. The requirements.txt lists torch==2.10.0 but the official runpod image template has pytorch 2.9.1 (CUDA 12.8). Can you please clarify which versions of python, pytorch, and CUDA will be used in the evaluation environment?

2. Will you please update the readme to clarify if you will be using SXM or NVL H100s?
